subcodes.first_line: O radiant leaves! Your letter hath arrived and, praise be to God, it was evidence of the illumination and spirituality of those handmaidens of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات نورانیه نامه شما رسید الحمد لله دلیل بر نورانیت و روحانیت آن اماء رحمن بود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @universal language
